description.value:
Coastwise threshold-wards in brine-script — the Gråtstrand tradition of salt-circle warding began as protection against high tides; it became something more when warding-scribes discovered the same patterns kept out other uninvited things.

Effect: Once per respite, you can ward a doorway, gate, or threshold until the end of the next encounter. Any creature that crosses the warded threshold takes a bane on their next ability roll. The Director determines how thresholds are defined in ambiguous situations.

Rules: Bane; Ability Roll; Encounter; Respite.

project.prerequisites: An implement of exceptional quality; a jar of threshold-brine from the Gråtstrand coast, inscribed with warding-script
